w:document.mc:Ignorable: w14 w15 w16se w16cid w16 w16cex w16sdtdh w16sdtfl w16du wp14

w:r.w:t: The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This famous pangram contains every letter of the English alphabet. Technology continues to evolve at an unprecedented pace. In 2025, many companies adopted advanced AI tools to increase productivity by over 40%. Students, professionals, and researchers all benefit from these innovations.

The quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog. This famous pangram contains every letter of the English alphabet. Technology continues to evolve at an unprecedented pace. In 2025, many companies adopted advanced AI tools to increase productivity by over 40%. Students, professionals, and researchers all benefit from these innovations.

Hello everyone! This is a test paragraph. It contains 25 words, numbers like 2026, and various punctuation marks such as commas, periods, exclamation marks, and question marks? Let's see how well the code extracts clean words.

Hello everyone! This is a test paragraph. It contains 25 words, numbers like 2026, and various punctuation marks such as commas, periods, exclamation marks, and question marks? Let's see how well the code extracts clean words.

Artificial Intelligence is transforming the world rapidly. From healthcare to education, AI systems are helping humans solve complex problems. Machine learning, a subset of AI, allows computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.

Artificial Intelligence is transforming the world rapidly. From healthcare to education, AI systems are helping humans solve complex problems. Machine learning, a subset of AI, allows computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed.

Climate change remains one of the biggest challenges facing humanity today. Rising global temperatures have led to extreme weather events, melting ice caps, and rising sea levels. Governments around the world are setting ambitious targets to reduce carbon emissions. However, achieving these goals requires collective effort from individuals, businesses, and policymakers.

Climate change remains one of the biggest challenges facing humanity today. Rising global temperatures have led to extreme weather events, melting ice caps, and rising sea levels. Governments around the world are setting ambitious targets to reduce carbon emissions. However, achieving these goals requires collective effort from individuals, businesses, and policymakers.
